zh.lifeSummary: 當Baroness of Fenwick Agnes Mullaly De Bottle於1414年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾時，她的父親William De Bottle34歲，母親Mary Ann Jackson30歲。她與Alexander Coles結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1492年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baroness of Fenwick Agnes Mullaly De Bottle于1414年出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾时，她的父亲William De Bottle34岁，母亲Mary Ann Jackson30岁。她与Alexander Coles结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1492年在英国英格兰薩默塞特享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bottle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English female personal name Botild (Old Scandinavian Bóthildr, Bothild, from bót ‘remedy’ + hildr ‘battle, war’).

variants.name: Bottles
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Bottle  .

variants.name: Boutell
meanings: English (Essex and Suffolk): nickname perhaps for a flour sifter, from Anglo-Norman boletel, buletel ‘sieve, bolting-cloth’ (Old French buletel, earlier buretel) ‘sieve’. In Middle English buletel was used to denote a kind of cloth especially prepared for sifting, and the name may have been given to a maker of this cloth or be a shortened form of Boulter .

variants.name: Buttles
meanings: English: probably a variant of Buttle, itself a variant of Bottle or Boutell .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: Mullaly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Tipperary and Kildare): variant of   Mullally  .

variants.name: Mullally
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Conn.
Irish (Tipperary and Kilkenny): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maolalaidh ‘descendant of Maolaladh’, a personal name from maol ‘youth, chieftain’ + aladh ‘particolored, piebald’.

en.lifeSummary: When Baroness of Fenwick Agnes Mullaly De Bottle was born in 1414, in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, William De Bottle, was 34 and her mother, Mary Ann Jackson, was 30. She married Alexander Coles. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1492, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baroness of Fenwick Agnes Mullaly De Bottle est née en 1414, à Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William De Bottle, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Mary Ann Jackson, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander Coles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1492, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Baroness of Fenwick Agnes Mullaly De Bottle(이)가 1414년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William De Bottle(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Ann Jackson(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 Alexander Coles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1492년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.
